issues.title: [BUG] Link creation ignores era and tech — bandwidth and type always hardcoded
issues.author: walace-lopes-peng
issues.description: Link creation logic currently ignores the current era and unlocked technologies, using hardcoded values for bandwidth and node types.

issues.title: [FEAT] Economic Pressure & Recovery — Debt Escalation System
issues.author: walace-lopes-peng
issues.description: Implement a system where debt escalates over time, creating economic pressure and requiring strategic recovery plans.

issues.title: [CI] Add npm test and ai-linter to CI pipeline
issues.author: devanomaly
issues.description: Integrate automated testing and AI-driven linting into the CI pipeline to ensure code quality and consistency.

issues.title: [BUG] Broken board-sync.yml — unresolved merge conflict markers
issues.author: devanomaly
issues.description: The board-sync.yml workflow file contains unresolved merge conflict markers which prevent it from running correctly.

issues.title: [CHORE] Fix stale documentation — 6 docs-vs-code mismatches
issues.author: devanomaly
issues.description: Update documentation to match the current implementation in the codebase, fixing at least 6 identified mismatches.

issues.title: [CHORE] npm audit fix — resolve known CVEs in dev dependencies
issues.author: devanomaly
issues.description: Address known security vulnerabilities in development dependencies by running and verifying npm audit fixes.

issues.title: [FEAT] Persist game state to localStorage — survive browser refresh
issues.author: walace-lopes-peng
issues.description: Implement game state persistence using localStorage to allow players to continue their session after a page refresh.

issues.title: [Bug] Responsive Design: Scale Issues on Desktop & Mobile
issues.author: walace-lopes-peng
issues.description: Resolve UI scaling and layout issues on both desktop and mobile resolutions for a better user experience.

issues.title: [Code Quality] Stale Store Actions Cleanup
issues.author: walace-lopes-peng
issues.description: Audit and remove unused or deprecated actions from the global store to reduce technical debt.

issues.title: [PROCESS] Define v0.3 playtest gate — validate core loop before Phase 2
issues.author: devanomaly
issues.description: Establish clear criteria and metrics for the v0.3 playtest to validate the core loop mechanics before starting Phase 2.

issues.title: [Docs] Developer Onboarding & Gameplay Tutorial System
issues.author: walace-lopes-peng
issues.description: Create documentation for new developers and an in-game tutorial system to help players understand core mechanics.

issues.title: [FEAT] First-session milestones — onboarding rewards for early actions
issues.author: devanomaly
issues.description: Implement rewards and milestones specifically for the first session to encourage player engagement and onboarding.
